register.title: SGX Disclosure Non-Compliance
register.description: Failure to correctly ring-fence or disclose HQ property in IPO prospectus could trigger MAS/SGX action.

register.title: JTC Lease Residual — Change of Control
register.description: SGX listing constitutes a change in beneficial ownership; JTC consent may be required under lease terms.

register.title: JID Industrial Strata Value Softening
register.description: Jurong industrial strata remains illiquid; any forced sale or refinancing would face limited buyer pool.

register.title: Utility / SCDF Compliance Failure
register.description: Annual fire safety certificate renewal; failure to maintain could trigger SCDF closure order.

register.title: IT Infrastructure Failure
register.description: Aging UPS and server room infrastructure — failure could cause GoWell corporate data loss or downtime.

register.title: Singapore Industrial Real Estate Policy
register.description: JTC policy changes on industrial zoning or land use could affect permitted use or lease extension terms.

scenarios.name: IPO Disclosure Error — SGX Action
scenarios.verdict: Non-financial risk — reputational and regulatory impact; no direct asset value impact but could delay IPO by 6–12 months, costing significant advisory fees and management bandwidth.

scenarios.name: JTC Refuses Lease Extension (2038)
scenarios.verdict: If JTC does not renew the 30-year lease, residual value of the strata title approaches nil. Probability low but outcome is severe — contingency planning should begin by 2030.

mitigationPlan.action: Engage KPMG for independent HQ valuation; seek SGX pre-clearance on asset disclosure approach
Obtain formal legal opinion from Rajah & Tann on JTC change-of-control consent requirement
Procure replacement APC UPS units; schedule server room infrastructure upgrade Q3 2026
